item.title: Critical RCE in WidgetCorp Acme Server CVE-2099-12345
item.description: A critical remote-code-execution vulnerability tracked as CVE-2099-12345 was disclosed today affecting WidgetCorp Acme Server. Patches are available.

item.title: BleepingExample reports new ransomware crew
item.description: A new ransomware operation has been observed targeting healthcare organizations.
